verticals.label: Law Firms & Legal Practices
painPoints: intake forms taking 45+ minutes per new client
document review backlogs delaying case progress
missed follow-ups with leads who go to competitors within 24 hours
manual conflict checks slowing new matter opening
after-hours client calls going to voicemail
billable-hour leakage from administrative tasks
discovery review consuming associate time at $300+/hr
compliance documentation requirements (state bar reporting)
aiUseCases: Claude-powered intake agent that pre-qualifies leads 24/7 and books consults
Claude Code skill for automated conflict-of-interest checks across firm matter database
AI document review agent for contract redlining and discovery summarization
Lead-to-CRM sync with automated case-type classification
Court filing deadline tracker that calculates dates per local rules
Automated client status updates pulled from case management
Voicemail-to-text triage with priority routing
Bill review automation that flags time entries against ethics rules
verticals.regulatoryNotes: State bar advertising rules apply. Confidentiality and conflict checks mandatory. ABA Model Rule 1.1 (competence) increasingly cited for AI use.

verticals.label: Medical & Dental Practices
painPoints: no-show rates of 12-30% costing $200+ per slot
insurance verification taking 15-20 minutes per patient
patient intake paperwork done on clipboards
front-desk staff overwhelmed by phones and check-ins
review request follow-ups that never happen
prior authorization delays for procedures
post-op patient questions flooding nurse lines
appointment scheduling phone-tag loops
aiUseCases: Claude-powered SMS appointment confirmation + reschedule agent that reduces no-shows 40-60%
Insurance verification automation that queries payers and pre-fills patient files
HIPAA-conscious AI intake form that adapts questions based on chief complaint
Post-visit review request agent with personalized messaging by procedure
Patient FAQ chatbot trained on practice protocols
Recall automation for hygiene cleanings and annual exams
Prior-auth submission agent that drafts and tracks payer responses
Symptom triage agent that routes to telehealth, ER, or scheduling
verticals.regulatoryNotes: HIPAA covered. Business Associate Agreements required for any vendor handling PHI. State telehealth and dental practice acts apply.

verticals.label: Real Estate Agents & Brokerages
painPoints: lead response times averaging 24+ hours when speed-to-lead under 5 min wins
drip campaigns that read like templates and get ignored
showing requests at 9pm with no one to respond
listing description writing eating 2-3 hours per property
transaction coordination errors causing closing delays
old leads in CRM with no re-engagement strategy
referral tracking that lives in someone's head
open house attendee follow-up that drops to zero by day 3
aiUseCases: Claude-powered lead-response agent that texts within 90 seconds with property-specific data
Listing description generator pulling MLS data + neighborhood facts + walking distances
Showing-request triage that books on Calendly when calendar matches
Drip nurture that personalizes by buyer stage and neighborhood preference
Past-client reactivation agent that detects life events from public records
Transaction milestone tracker that auto-updates all parties
Open house follow-up that delivers comp data within 4 hours of visit
Investor lead qualifier that asks ROI, cash flow, and 1031 questions upfront
verticals.regulatoryNotes: TCPA applies to SMS automation. Fair Housing language must be reviewed for AI-generated copy. State licensing laws limit who can perform certain activities.

verticals.label: Home Services & Trades
painPoints: lead-form leads dying because no one calls back for hours
dispatcher juggling phones, scheduling, and angry customers simultaneously
estimate follow-ups that never happen, leaving 60% of quotes unanswered
review collection so manual it averages 1-2 per month
seasonal demand spikes overwhelming small teams
tech routing inefficiencies causing 2+ hours of windshield time daily
quote-to-close visibility that doesn't exist
customer questions about ETA, pricing, and payment during jobs
aiUseCases: Claude-powered phone agent that books service calls, qualifies emergencies, and routes to dispatch
Quote follow-up agent that texts at 24h, 72h, and 7d with FAQ answers
Review request automation triggered post-job-completion with name personalization
Dispatch optimization that suggests next stop based on tech location and skill match
AI estimator that drafts quotes from job-site photos and customer descriptions
After-hours intake bot that captures emergency vs. schedulable jobs
Customer ETA SMS that updates from GPS data
Lead-source attribution agent that ties closed jobs back to marketing channels
verticals.regulatoryNotes: TCPA for SMS. State contractor licensing limits scope. Service area definitions affect lead handling.
